title: Making Your Writing Come Alive with Precise Words

questions.question: What does "precise verbs" mean?
options: Action words that are very specific and detailed.
Groups of words that act like adverbs, giving more information about verbs.
A book or tool that helps you find synonyms (words with similar meanings).
questions.correct_answer: Action words that are very specific and detailed.
questions.explanation: "precise verbs" means: Action words that are very specific and detailed.

Groups of words that act like adverbs, giving more information about verbs.
questions.correct_answer: A book or tool that helps you find synonyms (words with similar meanings).
questions.explanation: "thesaurus" means: A book or tool that helps you find synonyms (words with similar meanings).

questions.question: Fill in the blank: Precise verbs make ______ more engaging.
questions.explanation: The full sentence is: "Precise verbs make writing more engaging."

questions.question: Which of the following is TRUE about this topic?
options: Adverbial phrases add detail about actions.
Practice planning and writing your own sci-fi descriptions.
Remember commas after introductory adverbial phrases.
Precise verbs make writing more engaging.
questions.correct_answer: Adverbial phrases add detail about actions.
questions.explanation: Correct! "Adverbial phrases add detail about actions." is one of the key things to remember.
